customers_say: Customers find the water purifier to be of good quality, working reliably, and appreciate that installation is free. The product receives positive feedback for its value, taste, and water quality, with one customer noting it increases water sweetness. Customers find it easy to use and professional, though opinions about service are mixed, with some praising it while others report poor service.

reviews.author: Amit Singh
reviews.title: Value for money and health…. All rounder
reviews.body: The water purifier is very good. I wanted a steel tank purifier as the water temperature in my residence used to be very high during summers which is not good to be stored in plastic containers even if it food grade as they are not meant to be used at such a high temperature. Also maintenance of steel tank is easy. Water filtration capacity is better than kent which I had earlier. Taste-wise it is good and the concept that if it plain RO then TDS controller should not be installed in Aquaguard is very thoughtful as it mixes unfiltered water with filtered water thereby increases the risk of con

reviews.author: Sammey
reviews.title: Good value for money.
reviews.body: Good one. Value for money. Water taste not soo good. No tds adjuster. Currently water tds is below 30. Seems mineral package is not so effective. Of course 😄 u can't expect more for this price, 7200 .

reviews.author: Nikhil
reviews.title: Excellent water purifier with great taste and quick installation!I
reviews.body: Recently purchased the Aquaguard and I am highly satisfied with its performance. The water taste is excellent, clean, and completely devoid of any previous odor. The [RO/UV/UF] filtration technology works perfectly for our household water supply. Pros:Design: Very sleek and compact, saves a lot of kitchen space.Water Quality: Noticeable improvement in clarity and taste.Installation: The Eureka Forbes technician arrived within 24 hours and completed the setup smoothly.Highly recommend this product to anyone looking for a reliable water purifier!

reviews.author: MOSES ROZARIO
reviews.title: Solid Water Purifier
reviews.body: I’ll be very honest—after doing thorough research online and reading many reviews, I finally chose this water purifier, and I’m extremely happy with my purchase. The product is amazing. The water tastes great, it handles very high TDS levels efficiently, and it operates with almost no noise at all, which is a big plus. The design is also elegant, modern, and looks beautiful in my kitchen. I bought it during the Amazon sale on 4th July for ₹7,200, and I believe it was an excellent deal for the features and performance it offers. Overall, I’m very satisfied with my purchase and would definitely

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Worth product
reviews.body: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Good product. Installation was done on time, and the water tastes clean. The purifier looks good and is easy to use. Happy with the purchase. Worth the price.
